description_long: This is a medium-sized, rectangular filing cabinet constructed primarily from wood with a natural grain finish. The cabinet features four spacious drawers, each equipped with a wide, metallic bar handle for easy access. The top surface is flat and bordered, suitable for placing small office items or documents. A small, round key lock is visible on the upper left corner of the top drawer, providing security for the contents. The sides and back are plain, showcasing the wood grain pattern without any additional features. The overall design is modern and functional, making it suitable for organized storage in professional or urban environments.
description: A wooden filing cabinet with four drawers, metallic bar handles, and a key lock on the top drawer. The design is modern and functional, with a natural wood grain finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing four drawers with metallic bar handles and a key lock on the top drawer.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain wood grain surface and the protruding handles of the drawers.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, uninterrupted wood grain surface with no visible handles or locks.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, highlighting the plain wood grain and the side profile of the handles.
